THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOUT, CHRISTOPHER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 135 6TH STREET #302 $788.92 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $788.92, STAYED UNTIL APR-05-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. PAYS FULL JUDGMENT BY 4/5/93 WRIT OF EXECUTION WILL BE STOPPED.
